response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no native-level Japanese, no demonstrated C/UNIX embedded firmware work in recent years, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no exposure to LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP). C/C++ experience is limited to a brief 2014-2015 stint at National Instruments. The mismatch is too large to justify an interview.
strengths: Long software engineering track record with diverse language exposure including some C/C++
Experience with Linux environments, Docker, and low-latency systems
Self-driven learner who builds tools, libraries, and runs technical workshops
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or networking-security (MACsec/802.1X/NETCONF) experience
No Linux kernel source modification or chip-vendor SDK experience
